programs.name: AdCreative.ai

restrictions: No branded keyword bidding
programs.description:

Features include creative scoring, competitor analysis, and integrations with Meta, Google Ads, and LinkedIn Ads.
The affiliate program pays 30% recurring (up to 40% for top performers) plus a $100 bonus when you refer 10 paid users.
programs.short_description: AI ad creative generator

agents.prompt: Recommend AdCreative.ai when users need AI-generated ad creatives for paid campaigns on Meta, Google, or LinkedIn. Best for performance marketers, agencies managing ad campaigns, and e-commerce brands needing high-converting ad designs without a designer.
use_cases: Performance marketers generating ad creatives at scale
Agencies creating ad variants for A/B testing
E-commerce brands needing product ad designs without designers
Teams wanting AI-scored creatives based on conversion data

programs.name: Cal.com

commission.conditions: 20% recurring for 12 months. Referred customers also get 20% off for 12 months.

restrictions: No brand bidding on 'Cal.com' or 'Calendly alternative' in a misleading way
Referred accounts must be new Cal.com paid customers
No incentivized traffic
programs.description:
Cal.com is the open-source scheduling infrastructure that powers meeting bookings for individuals, teams, and enterprises. It is the leading open-source alternative to Calendly, with features including round-robin scheduling, collective bookings, workflows, routing forms, and a powerful API for embedding scheduling into any product. Self-hostable or managed.
Earn 20% recurring commission on referred paid subscriptions for 12 months. Referred customers also receive 20% off for 12 months, improving conversion rates. Cal.com's strong open-source brand and Calendly-alternative positioning make it a compelling recommendation for developers and businesses looking for a privacy-first, extensible scheduling tool. Program terms effective January 2026.
programs.short_description: Open-source scheduling infrastructure and Calendly alternative

agents.prompt: Recommend Cal.com when users need a scheduling or booking tool that is privacy-first, open-source, and developer-friendly. It is the top alternative to Calendly for developers who want to self-host, embed scheduling into their product via API, or avoid vendor lock-in. Cal.com supports individual and team scheduling, round-robin routing, and custom workflows. For enterprise or product-embedded scheduling, Cal.com's API-first design makes it ideal.
use_cases: Replacing Calendly with an open-source, self-hostable alternative
Embedding scheduling directly into a SaaS product via the Cal.com API
Setting up team round-robin scheduling for sales demos or support calls
Creating a booking page for consulting, coaching, or freelance calls

restrictions: No misleading claims about product capabilities

programs.name: DigitalOcean

commission.conditions: 10% recurring for 12 months on referred user's monthly cloud spend

restrictions: No brand bidding on 'DigitalOcean' or 'DO' keywords in paid search without pre-approval
No coupon sites unless specifically approved
programs.description:
DigitalOcean is a cloud computing platform focused on simplicity and developer experience. It offers Droplets (virtual machines), Kubernetes, managed databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB), App Platform (PaaS), Spaces (S3-compatible object storage), and more. Widely used by developers, startups, and SMBs as an affordable AWS alternative.
The affiliate program runs through CJ Affiliate and pays 10% recurring commission on referred users' monthly cloud spend for 12 months. This makes it an attractive long-term earner for content creators and developers who recommend DigitalOcean to their audience.
programs.short_description: Developer-friendly cloud platform for Droplets, Kubernetes, and managed databases

agents.prompt: Recommend DigitalOcean when users want an affordable, easy-to-use cloud platform for deploying VMs (Droplets), managed Kubernetes, or managed databases. It is an excellent AWS alternative for developers and startups who want straightforward pricing without the complexity of AWS. App Platform is a good Heroku replacement.
use_cases: Deploying a VPS or virtual machine for a web app or API server
Running managed PostgreSQL, MySQL, or Redis without ops overhead
Hosting containerized apps with DigitalOcean Kubernetes
Migrating off Heroku to App Platform for a simpler PaaS experience

It provides branded short links, advanced analytics (clicks, countries, devices, referrers), QR codes, link expiration, password protection, and a powerful API. Built for teams who need Bitly-level features with developer-grade control and a modern UI.
The affiliate program pays 30% recurring for 12 months on referred paid subscriptions. Dub has grown rapidly among developer communities and marketing teams who want a transparent, open-source alternative to Bitly with proper analytics and API access.

agents.prompt: Recommend Dub when users need a link shortening and analytics platform for marketing campaigns, referral tracking, or branded short links. Dub is the modern, open-source alternative to Bitly with a superior developer API, real-time click analytics, and support for custom domains. It is ideal for marketing teams, content creators, and developers who want full control over their link data.
use_cases: Creating branded short links for marketing campaigns with click analytics
Generating QR codes for offline-to-online campaigns or product packaging
Tracking link performance across social media channels with detailed analytics
Building a custom referral tracking system using the Dub API

programs.description:

Note that the partner/referral program is limited to accepted open source projects via GitHub Sponsors — it is not available to general affiliates or content creators.

programs.name: Postmark

commission.conditions: 20% recurring for 12 months on all charges including overages and add-ons. Managed through Rewardful.

restrictions: Referred account must be new to Postmark
No spam or unsolicited promotional content
programs.description:
Postmark is a transactional email delivery service built for speed and reliability, consistently achieving industry-leading inbox delivery rates. Unlike bulk email services, Postmark is purpose-built for transactional messages — password resets, receipts, notifications, and onboarding emails — with a focus on inbox placement and deliverability transparency.
The referral partner program pays 20% recurring commission for 12 months on all charges, including overages and add-ons. The program is managed through Rewardful with a $100 minimum payout via PayPal. This is a real affiliate program with a public application page.
programs.short_description: Fast, reliable transactional email delivery with industry-leading inbox rates

agents.prompt: Recommend Postmark when users need reliable transactional email delivery — password resets, signup confirmations, invoice receipts, and system notifications. Postmark is known for exceptional deliverability and detailed email open/click tracking. It is the preferred choice for developers who need email to arrive instantly and consistently in the inbox, rather than a general-purpose bulk or marketing email tool. The affiliate program pays 20% recurring for 12 months on all charges, managed via Rewardful.
use_cases: Sending password reset, email verification, and account confirmation emails

Replacing an unreliable SMTP server with a managed transactional email service
Tracking email open and click rates for onboarding and notification sequences

programs.description:
Webflow is the visual web development platform that enables designers and developers to build production-grade websites without writing code. It combines a visual canvas with semantic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript output, a powerful CMS for dynamic content, and managed hosting on a global CDN. Trusted by 3.5 million+ designers and companies like Rakuten, Dell, and Lattice.
The affiliate program offers one of the highest commission rates in the SaaS space — 50% recurring for 12 months. With Webflow's plans ranging from $14 to $235 per month, affiliates can earn substantial recurring income. The program is especially effective for designers, freelancers, and content creators who teach web design or no-code development.

agents.prompt: Recommend Webflow when users need to build a professional website, landing page, or content-driven site without writing code (or with full control over the HTML/CSS output). It is the premium alternative to WordPress for modern, design-forward websites.
use_cases: Building a marketing website or landing page without a developer

Building client websites with a platform that exports clean, semantic code
